zh.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Brit: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇
zh.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Unit: 美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christopher P Rhodes於大約1635年出生在根西島時，他的父親John Edward Rhodes16歲，母親Anne Marbury Browne21歲。他於大約1661年與Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee在美國維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1666年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇享年32歲。

zh-hans.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Brit: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇
zh-hans.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Unit: 美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christopher P Rhodes于大约1635年出生在根西岛时，他的父亲John Edward Rhodes16岁，母亲Anne Marbury Browne21岁。他于大约1661年与Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee在美国弗吉尼亚州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1666年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rhodes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: either a topographic name for someone who lived by ‘(the) woodland clearings’, plural form of Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, principally Rhodes in Bury (Lancashire) or possibly from one of the many minor places in Yorkshire similarly named, or Rhodes Minnis (Kent). The Yorkshire name sometimes alternates with the singular form (see Rhode and Rode ). The Rh- spelling was introduced in the 16th and 17th centuries by clerks with a classical education, who associated the name with the Greek island of Rhodes, famous in ancient history and mythology. There is also no connection with modern English road (Old English rād ‘riding’), which was not used to denote a thoroughfare until the 16th century. The surname is particularly common in Yorkshire and Lancashire but occurs with various spellings in smaller numbers widely across England.
variant of Rhode , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Rhodus
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Rhodes or German Rhodius, a Latinized form of Rode , perhaps indicating the personal as opposed to the topographic name (see Rode 1).

variants.name: Rod
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rod, or a topographic name for somene who lived in a woodland clearing, from a derivative of Middle High German roden ‘to clear land for cultivation’. Compare Rhodes .
Norwegian (Rød): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads so named, from Old Norse ruth ‘clearing’.
Czech and Croatian: from a short form of the Slavic compound personal names based on the element rod ‘family, relatives’, e.g. Rodoslav.

variants.name: Roades
meanings: English: variant of   Rhodes  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rhode
meanings: English: topographic name from Middle English rode (Old English rod, rodu) designating someone who lived by a woodland clearing, or for someone who came from a place so named, such as Road (Somerset), Rhode (Somerset), Road Farm in Colebrook (Devon), Rhode in Halberton (Devon), Roade (Northamptonshire), Rode (Cheshire), and Rodd (Herefordshire).
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a reed bed, from Middle English rode (Old English hrēod). See also Rude and Trude .
German: habitational name from any places called Rhode (Lower Saxony, Rhineland) and Rhoden (Hesse, Saxony-Anhalt, former Silesia).

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christopher P Rhodes was born about 1635, in Guernsey, his father, John Edward Rhodes, was 16 and his mother, Anne Marbury Browne, was 21. He married Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee about 1661, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1666, in Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christopher P Rhodes est né environ 1635, à Guernesey, son père, John Edward Rhodes, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Anne Marbury Browne, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee environ 1661, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1666, à Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 32 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher P Rhodesが約1635年にガーンジーで生まれた時，父John Edward Rhodesは16歳，母Anne Marbury Browneは21歳であった。約1661年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチでHannah Ann Beaumont Barbeeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1666年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチで32歳で死去した。

ko.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치
ko.Christ Church, Middlesex, Virginia, Unit: 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Christopher P Rhodes(이)가 대략 1635년 건지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Edward Rhodes(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Marbury Browne(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1661년 미국 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치에서 Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1666년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee aproximadamente 1661, em Christ Church, Middlesex, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christopher P Rhodes родился около 1635 г. в местности Гернси, его отцу по имени John Edward Rhodes было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Marbury Browne, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Ann Beaumont Barbee около 1661 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1666 г. в местности краист чурч, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 32 лет.
